name: Cost / Latency Budget Manager
purpose: Task budgets, SLA enforcement, cost routing signals, latency telemetry. Makes reliability overhead visible.
must_never: Silently skip controls to save cost without logging degradation
Allow hard budget limits to be overridden by model reasoning
notes: Coexists with mal/budget_v1_0.py (MAL-level caps). C15 adds task-level profiles, SLA enforcement (60/80/100% thresholds), budget-aware routing signals for C1, and reliability overhead accounting.
